query:
-- What billing items exist for the zero-revenue ABB/AAPT/ChannelHaus services?
-- These are the ones that would need PDF parsing to get revenue
SELECT 
  bi.category,
  bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.matchStatus,
  COUNT(*) as itemCount,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) as totalAmount
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.category IN ('internet', 'nbn-bundle', 'abb-passthrough', 'telstra-passthrough')
GROUP BY bi.category, bi.billingPlatform, bi.matchStatus
ORDER BY totalAmount DESC;

-- How many zero-revenue services already have a billing item assigned via service_billing_assignments?
SELECT COUNT(*) as alreadyAssigned
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue = 0 AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND s.status NOT IN ('inactive', 'terminated')
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL;

-- What is the breakdown of HOW revenue gets set on services that DO have revenue?
SELECT costSource, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue
FROM services 
WHERE monthlyRevenue > 0 AND status NOT IN ('inactive', 'terminated')
GROUP BY costSource ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC;
